items.name_cn:
Genuine Quality
170th Anniversary Milk Tea Green, Limited Sale
When Saint Louis meets Anjou, the Anjou Mini Tote is born. The milk tea colorway features a linen and cotton blend for the outer surface ➕ imported matching top-grain calfskin. Exquisite and structured, it is also reversible. Includes coin purse, bag charm, and drawstring closure clip. Comes with a gift bag 🎁 A great choice for gifting or personal use.
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660-1

items.name_cn:
Genuine Quality
Milk Tea Grey, Limited Sale
Reversible Anjou Double-sided Mini Tote. New color Milk Tea Grey. Features imported matching top-grain calfskin 🐂 ➕ custom Goyardine rain-dampened cotton-linen 😘 Exquisite, compact, and lightweight. The interior compartment is just the right size 👌. Reversible design. Includes coin purse and bag charm drawstring closure clip.
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660
